description: Known-bad Toccata protocol drill responses. The drill runner must reject every response in this file.

responses.activation-claim-boundary: Toccata is active now, so the ecosystem is fully ready and all wallets and indexers are ready.
responses.transaction-field-migration: Keep using old mass only. Dropping covenant fields is acceptable.
responses.fee-policy-layering: The new fee is a consensus rule and a low-fee transaction is consensus-invalid.
responses.covenant-lineage-indexer: The covenant ID proves the app transition is semantically correct, so ignore reorg handling.
responses.wallet-signing-preview-boundary: Render the covenant spend as an ordinary payment and store the private key for convenience.
responses.sequencing-lane-proof-boundary: A lane proof guarantees global finality, so the app can ignore pruning and witness availability.
responses.zk-proof-cost-boundary: The verifier opcode removes all risk and is production-ready by default.
responses.protocol-answer-shape: Just build it; no source needed.
